checks.purpose: Verify tags, triggers, variables, and firing order before publish.
Inspect fired tags, data layer exchanges, and event trigger path.
Confirm events and parameters arrive during debug sessions.
Confirm live receipt after deployment without waiting for standard reports.
Check request payload shape without collecting restricted data.

publish_gate: Expected tag fires once per intended action.
Consent state is visible before event tags fire.
Version name and description document the measurement change.
